response.global_summary: The video begins with an introductory talking segment featuring two VTubers, followed by a musical performance of a song in Japanese. The song title and artist information could not be confirmed through web search, so the lyrics fields are set to null.

scenes.description: Two VTubers are talking and dancing slightly in an intro sequence on stage.
The VTuber Kobo Kanaeru performs a song on stage with another performer. The performance features choreography and lighting effects.
